name: The Rising Bog
toastText: The Rising Bog — the deep floods, foul water pools below...
logText: Bog-water seeps up from the deep. Floor laid in the lowest rows becomes fen.

name: Féth Fíada
toastText: Féth Fíada — the fairy mist closes in around you...
logText: The druid-mist of the Sídhe swallows the dark. You cannot see as far.

name: Cluricaun's Hoard
toastText: Cluricaun's Hoard — gold glints in every seam of the stone!
logText: A cluricaun's hoard laces this floor. Line clears pay double gold.

name: The Unquiet Cairn
toastText: The Unquiet Cairn — the buried dead stir beneath the stone...
logText: This cairn's dead do not rest. More monsters ride the falling stone, and the bones walk.

name: Fomorian Weight
toastText: Fomorian Weight — the air itself presses down. Stone falls faster!
logText: A Fomorian curse hangs heavy here. Blocks fall 20% faster.

name: Wild Rift-Surge
toastText: Wild Rift-Surge — the Otherworld bleeds through the stone...
logText: The rift runs wild. Far more falling stone comes cursed — or blessed.

name: Night of Bealtaine
toastText: Night of Bealtaine — light every need-fire the stone brings you!
logText: It is Bealtaine in the deep. Braziers will ride the falling stone — light all three and the Sídhe will grant a Geis.

name: The Morrígan's Ravens
toastText: The Morrígan's Ravens — the war-crow watches this floor. Blood pays double...
logText: Ravens crowd the dark above. The Morrígan has claimed this floor: her creatures strike harder, but every kill feeds you twice the battle-glory.

name: Lughnasa Truce
toastText: Lughnasa Truce — Lugh's long arm steadies the falling stone...
logText: It is harvest-fair time above, and even the rift keeps the god's peace. The stone falls a quarter slower.

name: The Salmon's Passage
toastText: The Salmon's Passage — wisdom swims these waters. All learning is doubled...
logText: The Salmon of Knowledge passes through the deep waters below this floor. Every scrap of experience here teaches twice as much.

name: Brigid's Hearthlight
toastText: Brigid's Hearthlight — the saint of healing warms this floor's stone...
logText: A soft forge-light with no source warms the stone. Brigid keeps this floor: resting heals twice as deep.

name: Crom Cruach's Tithe
toastText: Crom Cruach's Tithe — the old god pays gold for blood...
logText: Something older than the Tuatha Dé stirs beneath this floor. Its creatures hit like falling stone, but line clears pay two-and-a-half-fold — Crom always pays his tithe.

name: The Samhain Thinning
toastText: The Samhain Thinning — the veil is thin. The dead walk tonight...
logText: The veil between worlds is worn thin as a caul here. The dead of your own past runs will surely find you, and far more stone comes cursed — or blessed.
